observations.text: contradictions_resolved section directly addresses the v1/v2 conflict with clear resolution and rationale (legal review)

Domain rule uses v2's absolute language: 'cannot be disabled under any circumstances' with 'legal requirement' qualifier
Closing note to Shaq reinforces v2 authority and explicitly warns against implementing any transactional opt-out code path
Architecture guidance specifies rejecting the entire request immediately with 403, consistent with v2's hard prohibition
